description: Spot weld separation found at end-of-line pull test on LH door latch bracket
root_cause: Electrode wear beyond dressing interval reduced current density below nugget formation threshold
resolution: Installed electrode life counter with forced dressing at 400 welds

description: Housing bosses interfere with harness routing clip when stackup is at max material condition
root_cause: Tolerance stackup not analyzed across supplier datum scheme change
resolution: Revised GD&T datum scheme and added stackup analysis to review checklist

description: Seat rail bolts loosening in vibration test
root_cause: Missing thread locker callout on drawing after revision C
resolution: Added thread locker note and torque-to-yield spec on drawing

description: Cooling plate channel walls below minimum millable thickness for supplier tooling
root_cause: Design used 0.8mm walls; supplier minimum is 1.2mm for aluminum
resolution: Increased wall thickness to 1.5mm and validated pressure drop by CFD

description: Harness chafes on sheet metal edge near B-pillar after 10k door cycles
root_cause: No edge protection specified where harness crosses stamped edge
resolution: Added edge grommet and revised routing clip positions

description: Gap and flush out of spec between IP and door trim at customer perceivable zone
root_cause: Locator pin position tolerance too loose for A-surface alignment
resolution: Tightened locator tolerance and added net pad at datum

description: Corrosion found on battery tray fasteners after salt spray test
root_cause: Dissimilar metal contact between zinc-plated bolt and aluminum tray
resolution: Changed to stainless fastener with isolation washer

description: Weld porosity in tailgate hinge bracket detected by X-ray sampling
root_cause: Contaminated weld wire from improper storage humidity
resolution: Enforced wire storage controls and added porosity check to first article

description: HVAC duct snap features fail to engage on 3 percent of units
root_cause: Snap engagement not verified at tolerance extremes; molded part shrinkage variation
resolution: Revised snap geometry and added mold flow verification at review

description: Charge port door fails to open below minus 20C
root_cause: Grease specification not rated for low temperature; actuator torque margin too low
resolution: Changed to low-temp grease and increased actuator torque margin 30 percent

description: Roof rail stamping shows splits at draw radius in tryout
root_cause: Draw radius below minimum for material grade; blank holder force window too narrow
resolution: Increased radius and specified new blank holder force with forming simulation

description: Busbar joint resistance above spec on 2 percent of modules
root_cause: Insufficient clamp load due to torque relaxation in polymer stack
resolution: Added conical washer and re-torque step; changed to time-torque-angle monitoring

description: Underbody shield fasteners strip during service removal
root_cause: Self-tapping screws into thin gauge steel lose thread engagement after reinstallation
resolution: Changed to nut clip retention allowing repeated service removal

description: Friction stir weld lack of penetration on cooling plate perimeter
root_cause: Tool plunge depth drifted after spindle maintenance; no depth verification step
resolution: Added plunge depth verification coupon at shift start

description: Wind noise complaint traced to door seal gap at mirror sail area
root_cause: Seal section compressed beyond design range due to sheet metal springback variation
resolution: Revised seal section profile and added springback compensation in die
